meta.title: Live Customization - streetwave®
meta.description: Live customization at your event. Custom zones, interactive activations, and a WOW factor.

hero.title: Live customization at your event
hero.subtitle: A custom zone with artists, equipment, and branding. Interactive activations that engage your audience.

items.title: Custom Zone
items.desc: An artist on-site customizing sneakers and apparel for guests in real time. Zone branding tailored to your style.

items.title: Limited Edition Run
items.desc: We produce a batch of custom items for gifting to guests or retail. Ready-made merch with a unique design.

items.title: Interactive Activation
items.desc: Guests take part in the process - choosing design elements, watching the painting unfold. We create engagement and content.

cta.title: Planning an event?
cta.subtitle: Tell us about the format - we'll propose a solution and estimate the budget.
